highlights.text: Cape Town (5N) → Shamwari Private Game Reserve (3N) deep-dive circuit
Table Mountain VIP, Cape Peninsula & marine wildlife cruise
Robben Island history & Kirstenbosch canopy walk
Six Big Five safaris, cheetah rehab centre & bush walk

itinerary.title: Cape Town Safari Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Cape Town • Shamwari • Big Five Safari • Marine Wildlife
itinerary.overview: An immersive family journey combining rich cosmopolitan relaxation with breathtaking wildlife experiences. Focus deeply on Cape Town's iconic landmarks and the premier malaria-free wilderness of the Eastern Cape — custom-designed for premium families balancing cultural exploration with multi-day Big Five safari adventure.
itinerary.seo_title: ZA-003 | Cape Town Safari Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 08 Nights / 09 Days South Africa family package (ZA-003): Cape Town deep dive and 3-night Shamwari luxury safari with cheetah rehabilitation centre.

days.title: Cape Town — Arrival & Waterfront Exploration
days.description: Warm greeting at Cape Town International Airport. Transfer to premium V&A Waterfront hotel. Two Oceans Aquarium and welcome harborfront dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private executive airport transfer, V&A Waterfront family walk
Evening Experience: Harborfront Premium Seafood Welcome Dinner
Overnight Stay: Cape Town (Handpicked Premium Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: Welcome Dinner

days.title: Cape Town — Table Mountain VIP & Historic Culture
days.description: Skip-the-line VIP Table Mountain cableway. Bo-Kaap, Company's Garden, and Signal Hill sunset viewing.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Table Mountain VIP Cableway, Bo-Kaap Tour, Company's Garden, Signal Hill Sunset
Evening Experience: Authentic Cape Malay fine-dining experience
Overnight Stay: Cape Town
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Cape Town — Peninsula Safari & Boulders Beach Penguins
days.description: Chapman's Peak Drive to Cape Point Funicular and Cape of Good Hope. Immersive African Penguin colony at Boulders Beach.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Chapman's Peak Drive, Cape Point Funicular, Cape of Good Hope, Boulders Beach Penguins
Optional Activities: High-speed private boat ride to Hout Bay Seal Island
Overnight Stay: Cape Town
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Gourmet Seafood Lunch

days.title: Cape Town — Marine Wildlife Cruise & Robben Island
days.description: Premium catamaran marine safari around Table Bay. Guided historical tour of Robben Island led by a former political prisoner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Marine Wildlife Catamaran Cruise, Robben Island Guided Museum Tour
Evening Experience: Relaxed family leisure at Camps Bay beach promenade
Overnight Stay: Cape Town
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Cape Town — Winelands Picnic & Kirstenbosch Canopy Walk
days.description: Constantia Valley historic estate tour and gourmet picnic. Boomslang canopy walkway at Kirstenbosch National Botanical Gardens.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Constantia Historic Estate Tour, Constantia Gourmet Picnic, Kirstenbosch Canopy Walk
Evening Experience: High-end contemporary dining at the waterfront
Overnight Stay: Cape Town
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Estate Picnic Lunch

days.title: Luxury Safari Lodge — Transit & Sunset Big Five Safari
days.description: Fly Cape Town to Gqeberha (Port Elizabeth). Transfer to malaria-free private game reserve. Inaugural sunset Big Five game drive and boma dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private Reserve Check-in, Sunset 4x4 Big Five Safari Tracking
Evening Experience: Traditional multi-course gourmet Boma dinner around a roaring wood fire
Overnight Stay: Eastern Cape Luxury Safari Lodge (Premium Family Suite)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast, High Tea, & Luxury Safari Dinner

days.title: Luxury Safari Lodge — Dawn Safari & Cheetah Rehabilitation
days.description: Dawn safari with expert tracker. Behind-the-scenes VIP tour of wildlife rehabilitation centre. Evening stargazing and constellation storytelling.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sunrise Bush Safari, Wildlife Rehabilitation Center VIP Tour
Evening Experience: Guided night-sky stargazing and constellation storytelling session
Overnight Stay: Luxury Safari Lodge
Meals Included: Premium Full Board (Breakfast, Lunch, High Tea, Dinner)

days.title: Luxury Safari Lodge — Bush Walk & Farewell Gala Dinner
days.description: Guided bush walk with armed ranger. Final signature sunset safari with sundowner ridge experience. Private family farewell gala dinner in a secluded bush clearing.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Dawn Safari Tracking, Guided Ranger Bush Walk, Sundowner Ridge Experience
Evening Experience: Private Family Farewell Gala Dinner hosted inside a secluded bush clearing
Overnight Stay: Luxury Safari Lodge
Meals Included: Premium Full Board (Gourmet Breakfast, Bush Lunch, Farewell Dinner)

days.title: Gqeberha — Morning Safari & Departure
days.description: Final sunrise safari drive. Celebratory luxury breakfast. Private transfer to Gqeberha airport for connecting flight home.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sunrise Safari Tracking Ritual
Transfers: Private Airport Executive Coach Drop
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

hotels.name: The Westin Cape Town (Family Interconnecting Rooms)
Kariega Game Reserve - Main Lodge (Family Chalet)
The Table Bay Hotel (Luxury Twin/Family Facing)
Shamwari Private Game Reserve - Long Lee Manor
The Silo Hotel (Two-Bedroom Family Duplex Penthouse)
Shamwari - Riverdene Family Luxury Lodge (Private Pool)

inclusions.text: 08 Nights: 5 in Cape Town and 3 in ultra-luxury malaria-free safari lodge
Daily gourmet breakfasts and dinners in Cape Town; all-inclusive premium full board at safari lodge
Dedicated private chauffeur-driven luxury family coach or premium SUV throughout
Six exclusive 4x4 open safari game drives led by qualified senior rangers
VIP Table Mountain, Cape Point funicular, Boulders Beach, marine catamaran, and Robben Island tickets
Wildlife Rehabilitation Centre behind-the-scenes tour and family bush clearing farewell dinner
International and domestic internal flight tickets
South African tourist visa fees and processing charges
Personal expenses, laundry, premium liquors, telephone calls, and gratuities
Optional adventure activities like shark cage diving, bungee jumping, or skydiving
Comprehensive international travel and health insurance
